//: TEMPLATE — .claude/settings.json hook registration block. Prescribed by gates scaffold H1. Drop into the target repo's .claude/settings.json. Each entry under hooks.PreToolUse[].matcher selects a tool (Bash, Write, Edit, etc.); each hook command is the shell invocation that fires before the tool runs. Exit code 2 from the hook blocks the tool call; any other non-zero exit is treated as a hook error.
